title: Weyerhaeuser to Release Second Quarter Results on July 29
text: Webcast and conference call at 7 a.m. PT (10 a.m.

title: 6 Jeff Auxier Stocks Approaching 52-Week Lows
text: As we approach the halfway point of 2022, several of Jeff Auxier (Trades, Portfolio)'s stocks are trading close to their 52-week lows.

title: 5 Top Stocks to Buy on Robust Wood Industry Trends
text: The Zacks Building Products - Wood industry is gaining from higher demand arising from home improvement activities and the export market. Industry players WY, RYN, LPX, UFPI and BCC are set to gain the most from the demand surge.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Stock a Buy Despite Lower Lumber Prices
text: Higher export market demand, rising capital inflows for carbon/ESG projects, and sustainable dividend bode well for Weyerhaeuser (WY).

title: Here's Why Weyerhaeuser (WY) is Poised for a Turnaround After Losing 12.6% in 4 Weeks
text: Weyerhaeuser (WY) is technically in oversold territory now, so the heavy selling pressure might have exhausted. This along with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in raising earnings estimates could lead to a trend reversal for the stock.

title: Weyerhaeuser (WY) Loses 10.2% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why a Trend Reversal May be Around the Corner
text: The heavy selling pressure might have exhausted for Weyerhaeuser (WY) as it is technically in oversold territory now. In addition to this technical measure, strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher indicates that the stock is ripe for a trend reversal.

title: This Is How Much I Made in REIT Dividend Income Last Year
text: My passive income from real estate is really starting to add up.

title: Is the Housing Market Flashing Warning Signs for Weyerhaeuser?
text: Lumber prices are falling, as are new home sales. Is the dividend for this timber REIT in danger?

title: Weyerhaeuser - Green Up Your Portfolio With This Old Growth Company
text: One of the largest owners of timberlands in the world, this REIT offers capital appreciation, a base quarterly and supplemental dividends. Wood products have been in high demand and have led to record earnings in 2021 and Q122 due to higher lumber prices.
